headline: Dermal Mycosis Market Research Report 2025-2026 & 2035, Competitive Analysis of Bayer, Kenvue, Karo Healthcare, Novartis, Glenmark Pharmaceuticals, Sun Pharma, Teva, and Sandoz
summary: The global dermal mycosis market is experiencing steady growth, driven by increased incidence of fungal skin infections, advancements in antifungal therapies, and rising tropical populations. Common fungal pathogens include Trichophyton, Epidermophyton, and Candida, with rising demand for effective topical and systemic treatments.
